subject: [PATCH 08/24] nfsd: update the fsnotify mark when setting or removing a dir delegation

2026-04-07.patch_summary: This patch updates the fsnotify mark on an nfsd_file object when setting or removing a directory delegation. It adds a new helper function, nfsd_fsnotify_recalc_mask(), that recalculates the mask based on the current delegations and ignores events as specified by the inode's lease mask. The function is called in two places: when unlocking a delegation lease and when getting a directory delegation. This ensures that fsnotify notifications are updated correctly to reflect changes in directory delegations.
